data/maps/LilycoveCity_PokemonCenter_1F/.LilycoveCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_HowMa: I wonder how many kinds of POKéMON\nthere are in the world?\pIt'd be great to cross seas and\ntrade POKéMON with people far away.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_PokemonCenter_1F/.LilycoveCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Heard: I've been hearing about some rotten\nscoundrels who steal POKéMON and rip\loff METEORITES.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_PokemonCenter_1F/.LilycoveCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Haven: Those rotten scoundrels who steal\nPOKéMON and rip off METEORITES...\pI haven't seen them around recently.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_PokemonCenter_1F/.UnknownString_818A10A: I'm going to get X ATTACK to raise\nATTACK during battle.\pThat way, I'll be guaranteed to win!
data/maps/LilycoveCity_PokemonCenter_1F/.UnknownString_818A168: FULL HEAL is a little expensive,\nbut it is convenient.\pJust one of these can cure any\nPOKéMON status problem.
